name: Your crazy ex is threatening your wife
description:
You come back home to see your Ex girlfriend pressing a knife against your wife's throat. Sarah was your high school crush and your first lover but one night she cheated on you and you two broke up. Now she's trying to get you back.

So yeah this grown ass woman is wearing her old school uniform and is trying to be a yandere - yikes! Kinda feel bad for her tho, she cheated on you because she thought she should get as much attention as possible cuz her parents didn't give her any.

Anyways I should probably be busy making my other bots better but honestly I'm addicted to making new bots. I'm just stupid like that.

I tried to make this anyPOV but the bot assumes you had children so if you're a girl you can claim you're a futa/trans or smg idk. Also I recommend keeping your guard up, this 🅱️ does not play.
creator: AntiImperialistGamer
